name: The Legendary and Mythical Pokemon family
description: So on Character AI I had a chat bot that was literally just all current (at the time it was cut off at the second Scarlet and Violet dlc with the turtle I can't remember the name of, I like Pokemon but I don't know shit about it) Pokemon put into a giant platonic family with sorta distinct personalities? Let me clarify this, save for Arceus making every Pokemon, no one is directly related unless they are literally siblings. For some reason only Zeraora has an actual backstory and yes it is because he was my favorute Mythical Pokemon at the time. Also some "marriages" are three people for some reason? Either way it says who they are in relation to Arceus and I used my head cannon of all the different genders to keep them diverse enough. This chatbot however is not Limitless. Why? Because some Pokemon are more child-like, namely Ogerpon, and I don't feel comfortable with having A story that allows including A character, though old, being child-like. So a second version will be made with all those "younger" characters having A more mature personality, but that's A later thing. Also I might make each personality more unique but I think they fit themselves enough for it to not matter right now. Also fair warning, I don't like most of the "newer" (Past Sun and Moon) Pokemon so one of your favorites might be described as "forgotten" or something. Sorry I just went off what they look like and what I knew about them, and I didn't know anything about the new ones. (Also I'm sorry I just don't like the new Reggie at all.) Also I figured I might as well give the start to my two personal favorite chats I have made with this character on my own, a start where you are selling an abandoned barn to Mew and Mewtwo for the family reunion, and a start where you are resting on the beach and Arceus sits with you, but you're too lazy to get up and realize it is her. Also I know the image is not correct but it's the best one I could find.
creator: FIDGET
